subject: [PATCH v2 05/14] fuse: refactor setting up copy state for payload copying

2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch refactors the code for setting up the copy state for payload copying in the FUSE file system. It introduces a new helper function `setup_fuse_copy_state()` that encapsulates the logic for importing user buffers and initializing the copy state. This simplifies the code and makes it easier to maintain by reducing duplication and improving modularity.
